projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Explore our project gallery where technical excellence meets innovation to deliver exceptional results.

items.name: San Juan Legislature Annex Building
items.description: Construction of a 5,960 m² architectural landmark featuring three underground levels and five service floors. Highlights include a state-of-the-art auditorium, library, and interactive spaces, designed with a bioclimatic longitudinal courtyard.
items.extra_description: One of the most emblematic works in the province, designed with cutting-edge technology and bioclimatic criteria to house modern legislative functions.

items.name: Ayres Village Commercial Gallery
items.description: A premium two-story Strip Mall development featuring 20 commercial spaces ranging from 45 m² to 160 m². Built with a sophisticated mixed system of masonry, steel frame, and reinforced concrete for maximum durability.
items.extra_description: An open-air commercial center that blends modernity and functionality, optimizing the shopping experience in a rapidly growing area.

items.name: Ayres Village Premium Residences
items.description: Urban development of 77 premium lots and luxury 3-bedroom residences. Complete with underground utilities, paved streets, and expansive landscaped green spaces across nearly 50,000 m².

items.name: Los Molinos Residential Complex
items.description: A large-scale housing project comprising 260 functional units across modern towers. Built with traditional excellence, featuring reinforced concrete and high-end aluminum and wood finishes.

items.name: Los Molinos Residential Complex
items.description: A large-scale housing project comprising 260 functional units across modern towers. Built with traditional excellence, featuring reinforced concrete and high-end aluminum and wood finishes.

items.name: San Juan Skate Park
items.description: A world-class sports facility at the San Juan Sports City. Featuring over 2,200 m² of precision-engineered reinforced concrete with professional-grade flat, curved, and inclined surfaces for high competition.

items.name: Centauri Adium Production Facility
items.description: A massive 4,370 m² industrial expansion including specialized production zones, advanced office spaces, and modern service utilities. Engineered for operational excellence in the pharmaceutical complex.

items.name: Punta Negra Dam Water Treatment Plant
items.description: A critical infrastructure project featuring a high-efficiency intake system and 21 filters. Includes massive 20,000 m³ storage tanks to secure water supply for the Ullum region.

items.name: 132 kV Power Line & Substation
items.description: Installation of high-voltage electrical infrastructure and substation expansions to strengthen the regional energy grid and increase renewable energy transport capacity.

items.name: Los Azules Copper Project
items.description: Critical road construction and infrastructure maintenance for internal project access, supporting large-scale mining operations in its fourth active season.

items.name: Veladero Mine Infrastructure
items.description: Comprehensive operational support including road maintenance and access development in key process and mining sectors, facilitating year-round project efficiency.

items.name: Hualilan Mineral Project
items.description: Mine development support including internal mineral transport infrastructure and pit opening operations to facilitate gold exploration and construction phases.

services.title: Services
services.description: Offering Concrete Solutions To Complex Requirements For Over 35 Years Through Personalized Technical Advice For Project And Construction Management.

engineering.title: Project Engineering
engineering.description: We develop engineering projects in their various stages, ensuring efficient, safe technical solutions that align with the requirements of each work.

construction.title: Construction
construction.description: We execute civil and industrial construction projects with high quality standards, optimizing resources and potentalizing the work of our professional team.

real-estate.title: Real Estate Developments
real-estate.description: We focus on the planning, execution, and commercialization of high-quality private neighborhoods, distinguished by urban qualities and strategic locations.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Implementing civil and architectural works for public and private sectors, covering everything from planning to coordination, ensuring quality and safety.

mining.title: Mining
mining.description: Specialized technical team for executing projects in mining locations with cutting-edge technology for massive soil movements and civil works.

equipment.title: Heavy Equipment Provision
equipment.description: We have our own fleet of equipment to offer provision and operation services in all stages of mining projects with highly qualified personnel.

history.title: History
history.description: SIGMA S.A. was founded in 1988 with the conviction of developing high-quality construction systems in San Juan and across the country. Since its inception, the company has focused on innovation, incorporating cutting-edge technologies and work techniques to optimize resources and empower a highly trained professional team.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide engineering and architecture services with high quality standards, optimizing time and resources, ensuring safety on site, and maximizing our clients' profitability. We strive to execute projects sustainably and efficiently.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To position ourselves as the best and most innovative company in construction and engineering, staying at the forefront of new technologies while respecting environmental conservation standards.

values.title: Values
values.description: At SIGMA S.A. we act with ethics, honesty, and transparency. We promote teamwork and continuous improvement, caring for the health and safety of our collaborators and respecting the environment through sustainable practices.

policy.title: Quality, Safety, and Environment Policy.
policy.description: At "SIGMA S.A." we assume the commitment to satisfy the requirements and expectations of our clients and stakeholders, providing services efficiently and responsibly aligned with ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, and ISO 45001:2018 standards.
